---
title: "Stat Mania"
format:
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    page-layout: full
    css: styles.css
    toc: false
---
<!--
```{=html}
<center>
<iframe class="slide-deck" src="slider.html"
        style="width: 100%; max-width: 800px; height: 75vh; max-height: 600px;
               border: none; display: block;">
</iframe>
</center>
```
-->

## <i class="fas fa-tools"></i> Data Science Tools

<div class="feature-grid">

<div class="feature-box">
  <a href="lectures.html"><i class="fa-solid fa-arrow-up-right-dots fa-3x"></i></a>
  <a href="lectures.html"><h3>Explore Lecture Slides</h3></a>
  <p>Learn statistical and mathematical concepts</p>
  <a href="lectures.html">Learn More ...</a>
</div>

<div class="feature-box">
  <a href="ds/viz/bar.html"><i class="fas fa-chart-column fa-3x"></i></a>
  <a href="ds/viz/bar.html"><h3>Make a Bar Chart</h3></a>
  <p>Visualize categorical data</p>
  <a href="ds/viz/bar.html">Learn More ...</a>
</div>

<div class="feature-box">
  <a href="ds/viz/gen-data.html"><i class="fas fa-database fa-3x"></i></a>
  <a href="ds/viz/gen-data.html"><h3>Generate Data</h3></a>
  <p>Track trends over time</p>
  <a href="ds/viz/gen-data.html">Learn More ...</a>
</div>

<div class="feature-box">
  <a href="ds/viz/hist.html"><i class="fas fa-chart-pie fa-3x"></i></a>
  <a href="ds/viz/hist.html"><h3>Histogram Maker</h3></a>
  <p>Show proportions clearly</p>
  <a href="ds/viz/hist.html">Learn More ...</a>
</div>

<div class="feature-box">
  <a href="ds/viz/pie.html"><i class="fas fa-chart-pie fa-3x"></i></a>
  <a href="ds/viz/pie.html"><h3>Pie Chart Maker</h3></a>
  <p>Upload your own CSV</p>
  <a href="ds/viz/pie.html">Learn More ...</a>
</div>

<div class="feature-box">
  <a href="ds/viz/scatter.html"><i class="fa-solid fa-chart-scatter fa-3x"></i></a>
  <a href="ds/viz/scatter.html"><h3>Scatter Plot Maker</h3></a>
  <p>Use regression or trees</p>
  <a href="ds/viz/scatter.html">Learn More ...</a>
</div>

<div class="feature-box">
  <a href="ds/viz/aes.html"><i class="fa-solid fa-hexagon-nodes fa-3x"></i></a>
  <a href="ds/viz/aes.html"><h3>Aesthetic Equations</h3></a>
  <p>Embed code with output</p>
  <a href="ds/viz/aes.html">Learn More ...</a>
</div>

</div>
